“四海无闲田，农夫犹饿死。”寥寥几字，道尽了古代封建社会下贫苦农民的悲苦一生。
生活在新时代的我们如果不小心穿越古代，绝不是一件值得庆幸的事。
因为，如今就是最好的时代。

p_read_item_cnt":"109"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032401091132537EECE5578CB5995C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12400,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":2134},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7518289963128423230","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢这类短而精悍的小说；开局慢是慢了点，后面包罗万象；看得出小六的人生观已经相当成熟，走的路才异常坚定……与成长到40岁后的稳辣。准备去作者其他三本看看有无所启发，作者，加油，看好你喲，你终成大神!(对应这本《横练成神》小六之路)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750496194,"group_id":"7159025322711583747","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阿拉上海额，上海Top宁","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nww6/5wOR7JjBoMKd7s1W3peIR0SFI0JqmnuyTJgg+tp","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/36f9d428bf8742c98d15f8703492b82a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879311&x-signature=I9XzcYE5D4n8QC11HB%2FId%2Bg29A8%3D","user_id":"3993867258697595","user_name":"绣里cang坤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3993867258697595","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7159025322711583747","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统+无女主+非无脑爽文+偏现实）

p_read_item_cnt":"274"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032401091132537EECE5578CB5995C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":75462,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":76609,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1478},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7415127750856131390","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"老实说，写的不错。一个普通的现代人穿越过去。会在善良和自私中挣扎，一会可能成恶人，一会可能冒出点善心。会后悔自己犯的错，还经常犯错，再后悔。一开始没什么见识，所以做事无所顾忌鲁莽的一笔，站高了反而小心翼翼。我能感觉到这个主角一直在成长，而不是穿越了就特么的心态无敌，智商无敌，这样写反而更真实，反而合我胃口。至于融合武学，固然有漏洞，但没关系，故事的基础逻辑还是让我满意的。我想打四分的，但是为了鼓励作者打了5颗星"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1726475146,"group_id":"7159025322711583747","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9EqM3pLA3Z80Zxd1obN5DHklDCHppxmwjOUwWjyuaaH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1516eb5202f342398f80c9d76d8ac84d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875327&x-signature=YlAnWX3WeNCNqjRDq7gJNcFlHgY%3D","user_id":"1398175371634029","user_name":"爸爸妈妈喊你吃晚饭"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1398175371634029","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7159025322711583747","book_info":{"abstract":"（无系统+无女主+非无脑爽文+偏现实）
